name_cn:
NÉONOÉ Classic Series #M44021# Uninspected Version
▪️Size: 26*26*17.5cm▪️
As a classic masterpiece and a must-have entry-level piece,
the wine bag designed in 1932 for carrying champagne meets contemporary trends,
transforming into a bucket bag embodying heritage beauty,
and is known as the "King of Classics".
It attracts people of all ages and eras,
with its large capacity design.
This is a classic King that can accompany you through prosperity,
and is also a bucket bag every woman needs!
